subject: feat(debug): add debug pill that shows on page load
body:
Implements the debug system from CLAUDE.md spec so errors are always
visible. The pill renders in a separate React root, surviving app
crashes. Captures global errors and unhandled rejections at module
load time. Collapsed pill shows entry count with error/warn badges;
expanded view has Log and Environment tabs with Copy/Clear actions.

Tags: debug, ui, alpha
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: debug-system
Semver: minor

title: add debug pill that shows on page load
